title: [InstCombine] Fix compare of bitcast pattern
author: daniel-donenfeld
description: The pattern matching `fcmp oeq/une (bitcast X), 0.0` assumes that X is an integer, but it is possible to cast between float types. Add a check for X being an integer type to fix the compiler crashing on this pattern. A lit test for this failure is also added.

comments.author: github-actions[bot]

The reproduction instructions above might return results for more than one PR

<details>
<summary>
View the diff from clang-format here.
</summary>

``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
index 9f0570d6a..97e1a6555 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
@@ -9157,7 +9157,7 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitFCmpInst(FCmpInst &I) {
   // fcmp oeq/une (bitcast X), 0.0 --> (and X, SignMaskC) ==/!= 0
   if (match(Op1, m_PosZeroFP()) &&
       match(Op0, m_OneUse(m_ElementWiseBitCast(m_Value(X)))) &&
-      X->getType()->isIntOrIntVectorTy() && 
+      X->getType()->isIntOrIntVectorTy() &&
       !F.getDenormalMode(Op1->getType()->getScalarType()->getFltSemantics())
            .inputsMayBeZero()) {
     ICmpInst::Predicate IntPred = ICmpInst::BAD_ICMP_PREDICATE;

``````````

</details>

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Daniel Donenfeld (daniel-donenfeld)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

The pattern matching `fcmp oeq/une (bitcast X), 0.0` assumes that X is an integer, but it is possible to cast between float types. Add a check for X being an integer type to fix the compiler crashing on this pattern. A lit test for this failure is also added.



---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/198389.diff


2 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp (+1) 
- (added) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/bfloat-bitcast-fcmp-zero.ll (+14) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
index 0b1f683e10408..94d56a228adb8 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
@@ -9153,6 +9153,7 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitFCmpInst(FCmpInst &I) {
   // fcmp oeq/une (bitcast X), 0.0 --> (and X, SignMaskC) ==/!= 0
   if (match(Op1, m_PosZeroFP()) &&
       match(Op0, m_OneUse(m_ElementWiseBitCast(m_Value(X)))) &&
+      X->getType()->isIntOrIntVectorTy() && 
       !F.getDenormalMode(Op1->getType()->getScalarType()->getFltSemantics())
            .inputsMayBeZero()) {
     ICmpInst::Predicate IntPred = ICmpInst::BAD_ICMP_PREDICATE;
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/bfloat-bitcast-fcmp-zero.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/bfloat-bitcast-fcmp-zero.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..249c750ce84b9
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/bfloat-bitcast-fcmp-zero.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --version 6
+; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
+
+define i1 @f(bfloat %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i1 @f(
+; CHECK-SAME: bfloat [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = bitcast bfloat [[X]] to half
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = fcmp une half [[TMP1]], 0xH0000
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[TMP2]]
+;
+  %1 = bitcast bfloat %x to half
+  %2 = fcmp une half %1, 0xH0000
+  ret i1 %2
+}

``````````

</details>
